svg.aria-label: Animated parchment scene: two pirates duel on a galleon under a drifting airship trailing a NO TESTS JUST PUSH AND COMMIT banner, with floating rock islands, clouds, a flock of birds, a moon and a shark below.

text.font-family: Palatino, 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif
